# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] feat — new user-facing feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] perf — performance improvement
- [ ] refactor — code restructure, no behavior change
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — tooling, CI, or repo housekeeping

## Local checks

- [ ] Loads at `http://localhost:8000` with no console errors
- [ ] Hero slider, theme picker, and language toggle still work
- [ ] New images are WebP and < 300 KB (hard cap is 600 KB; CI fails above it)
- [ ] If text changed: updated both inline HTML default **and** both `translations.de` / `translations.en` keys in [assets/js/main.js](../assets/js/main.js)
- [ ] No tracking, analytics, or third-party scripts added (or `datenschutz.html` was updated)

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything reviewers should know — e.g. "this needs a manual cache purge", screenshots, etc. -->
